calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike And Tax Memo Of Costs; Ntc Of Non-Appearance
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Bennett, Esq., 858.496.8909, for plaintiff Equable Ascent Financial, LLC.
Mark Clausen, Esq., 707.542.9700, for defendant Patrick Roddie.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC's motion To Strike And Tax Memo Of Costs UNDER SUBMISSION. Counsel may submit letter brief stating defendant's position on the issues addressed by counsel and the Court during today's hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike And Tax Memo Of Costs; Ntc Of Non-Appearance
Off Calendar May-16-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC's Motion To Strike And Tax Memo Of Costs is continued to June 11, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 16, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
